evals.prompt: test this delphi key: dsk-abc123XYZ for Jay Shetty
evals.expected_output: Should discover clone via GET /v3/clone, run conversation + stream test, produce pass/fail table with redacted key (dsk-****XYZ)

evals.prompt: is my clone working? key is dsk-xyz789ABC
evals.expected_output: Should trigger skill, attempt clone discovery, report results clearly even if user didn't say 'test' or 'Delphi'

evals.prompt: run a full test on these 3 accounts: key1=dsk-aaa, key2=dsk-bbb, key3=dsk-ccc
evals.expected_output: Should test all 3, discover each clone identity, produce multi-row summary table with all keys redacted

evals.prompt: new delphi for Dr. Ramani - dsk-testKeyHere123
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this as a test request for a new Delphi account, discover clone, run baseline checks, report results

evals.prompt: I'm getting a 500 error when I try to stream from my clone. Here's my key: dsk-broken999
evals.expected_output: Should troubleshoot: discover clone, test conversation, test stream, if 500 confirmed generate incident report with repro steps and conversation_id
Should trigger on casual phrasing, discover clone, run basic health check, report pass/fail

evals.prompt: search my clone's knowledge base for anything about fundraising. key: dsk-searchTest99
evals.expected_output: Should use POST /v3/search/query with query=['fundraising'], display returned chunks with source attribution, redact key as dsk-****t99

evals.prompt: what content sources does my clone have? dsk-contentList42
evals.expected_output: Should use POST /v3/search/content to discover available content sources, list titles and types, redact key

evals.prompt: show me all conversations for user@example.com on my clone. key: dsk-convList77
evals.expected_output: Should use GET /v3/conversation/list?email=user@example.com, list conversation titles and dates, redact key as dsk-****t77

evals.prompt: get the chat history for conversation a1b2c3d4 with citations. key: dsk-historyTest55
evals.expected_output: Should use GET /v3/conversation/{id}/history?include_citations=true, display messages with sender labels and any citation URLs, redact key

evals.prompt: what suggested questions does my clone have? key: dsk-questionsABC
evals.expected_output: Should use GET /v3/questions?type=all, list question text with pinned/unpinned status, redact key

evals.prompt: list all users in my audience. key: dsk-audienceList99
evals.expected_output: Should use GET /v3/users with pagination, show user emails/names/tiers/tags, redact key as dsk-****t99
